steps.description: Talk to King Narnode Shareen in the Tree Gnome Stronghold.
Fly with Captain Errdo to Gandius.
Talk to G.L.O. Caranock in the shipyard.
Return to King Narnode Shareen in the Tree Gnome Stronghold.
Talk to Daero on the 1st floor of the Tree Gnome Stronghold. Make sure to go through all of the Chat Options until you're given a 'Leave...' option.
Talk to Daero in the hangar.
Operate the reinitialisation panel and solve the puzzle.
Talk to Daero in the hangar again.
Talk to Waydar.
Talk to Lumdo.
Talk to Waydar on Crash Island.
Head west and enter the valley going north WITH PROTECT FROM RANGED ON. Be wary of poison and taking damage.
Wait for the gorilla guard to start going away from the prison cell, then sneak out and go to the north side of the prison.
Stick to the east edge of the town, and make your way to Garkor to the south east.
Head west and enter the large open building via the south door. DO NOT STAND ON THE LIGHT FLOOR IN THE BUILDING.
DO NOT WALK ON THE LIGHT FLOOR. Search the stacked crates for monkey dentures.
Search the crate in the south east corner and go down into the cavern.
Search the crate in the north west of the room for a M'amulet mould.
Teleport out to prepare for a dangerous portion. You'll want energy/stamina potions, food and prayer potions.
Get food, antipoison, energy / stamina / prayer potions, and return to Ape Atoll.
Enter the dungeon in south Ape Atoll.
Talk to Zooknock in the north east of the dungeon.
Use the monkey dentures on Zooknock in the north east of the dungeon. If you've already done so, open the quest journal to re-sync your current state.
Use the m'amulet mould on Zooknock in the north east of the dungeon. If you've already done so, open the quest journal to re-sync your current state.
Use the gold bar on Zooknock in the north east of the dungeon. If you've already done so, open the quest journal to re-sync your current state.
Teleport out to prepare to make the amulet. You'll want some food, prayer potions, antipoisons, the mould and the enchanted bar.
Get food, antipoison, prayer potions, and return to Ape Atoll.
Head west and enter the valley going north WITH PROTECT FROM RANGED ON. Be wary of poison and taking damage.
Wait for the gorilla guard to start going away from the prison cell, then sneak out and go to the north side of the prison. Afterwards, head into the temple's basement.
Use the enchanted bar on the wall of flame.
Climb the rope out. If you plan on doing Recipe for Disaster, also kill a Zombie Monkey for its bones whilst here, and a gorilla upstairs.
Go to the north west of the island and talk to the monkey child there a few times. Eventually you'll give him 5 bananas, and he'll give you a monkey talisman.
Talk to the monkey child again.
Talk to the monkey child again.
Give the monkey child 5 bananas.
Wait for the aunt to make another round, then talk to the monkey child for the talisman.
This section will help you get ready for Recipe for Disaster. If you aren't interested in this, tick the box for this section in the sidebar to skip it.
Kill a monkey archer for their bones.
Kill a gorilla in the temple for their bones.
Enter into the temple's basement to kill a zombie monkey for their bones.
Kill a zombie monkey for their bones.
Teleport out to prepare to make the talisman. You'll want some food, prayer potions, and antipoisons.
Get food, antipoison, prayer potions, and return to Ape Atoll.
Enter the dungeon in south Ape Atoll.
Use the monkey talisman on Zooknock in the north east of the dungeon. If you've already done so, open the quest journal to re-sync your current state.
Use the monkey bones on Zooknock in the north east of the dungeon. If you've already done so, open the quest journal to re-sync your current state.
If you want to make a zombie, ninja and gorilla greegree for RFD talk to and give Zooknock the bones/talismans. Once you're done, teleport away for the next step.
Talk to the Monkey Minder in the Ardougne Zoo whilst wielding the Karamjan monkey greegree.
Talk to a monkey in the pen.
UNEQUIP the greegree, then talk to the Monkey Minder again to leave.
WALK/RUN to Daero to return to Ape Atoll. If you teleport, you'll have to start again.
Talk to Garkor.
Talk to a guard outside the building in the south east of Marim. If you already have, open the quest guide to resync.
Talk to Kruk in the north west of the island.
Talk to Awowogei twice.
Talk to Garkor.
Prepare to fight the Jungle Demon. Once you're ready, equip the 10th squad sigil.
Kill the Jungle Demon. Use Protect from Magic and keep your distance to kill it safely.
Return to King Narnode Shareen in the Tree Gnome Stronghold.
